mapper.sql: select a.alarm_id, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_status, a.del_flag, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime, a.picture_path, a.video_path, a.create_time, h.update_time, a.create_by, a.update_by,a.scene_type ,h.identify,h.opinion,a.alarm_cid,a.irms_sn,a.target_name,a.remark_data from alarm a left join alarm_handle h on a.alarm_id = h.alarm_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(a.alarm_beginTime) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS count_of_transactions_today,
COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(a.alarm_beginTime) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS count_of_transactions_three_to_seven_days_ago,
COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) > DATE(a.alarm_beginTime) THEN 1 END) AS count_of_transactions_before_seven_days_ago
FROM alarm a left join alarm_handle d on a.alarm_id = d.alarm_id
a.del_flag = '0' and #{handleStatus} = d.handle_status and a.alarm_beginTime > #{startTime} and #{endTime} > a.alarm_beginTime

select SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_rank = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rank0, SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_rank = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rank1, SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_rank = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rank2 from alarm
del_flag = '0' and alarm_beginTime > #{startTime} and #{endTime} > alarm_beginTime

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN alarm_beginTime > #{alarm.startTime} AND #{alarm.endTime} > alarm_beginTime THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_count_custom_range, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(alarm_beginTime) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_today FROM alarm
alarm_beginTime > #{alarm.startTime} and #{alarm.endTime} > alarm_beginTime
mapper.insert:
insert into alarm
alarm_id, device_sn, alarm_type, alarm_rank, alarm_status, del_flag, alarm_beginTime, alarm_endTime, picture_path, video_path, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, alarm_cid, irms_sn, area_sn, scene_type, maxTemp, minTemp, target_name, tenant_id, remark_data,
#{alarmId}, #{deviceSn}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmRank}, #{alarmStatus}, #{delFlag}, #{alarmBegintime}, #{alarmEndtime}, #{picturePath}, #{videoPath}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{alarmCid}, #{irmsSn}, #{areaSn}, #{sceneType}, #{maxTemp}, #{minTemp}, #{targetName}, #{tenantId}, #{remarkData},

insert into alarm (alarm_id, device_sn, alarm_type, alarm_rank, alarm_status, del_flag, alarm_beginTime, alarm_endTime, picture_path, video_path, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, alarm_cid, irms_sn, area_sn, scene_type, maxTemp, minTemp, target_name, tenant_id, remark_data) values
(#{item.alarmId}, #{item.deviceSn}, #{item.alarmType}, #{item.alarmRank}, #{item.alarmStatus}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.alarmBegintime}, #{item.alarmEndtime}, #{item.picturePath}, #{item.videoPath}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.alarmCid}, #{item.irmsSn}, #{item.areaSn}, #{item.sceneType}, #{item.maxTemp}, #{item.minTemp}, #{item.targetName}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.remarkData})

insert into alarm
alarm_id, device_sn, alarm_type, alarm_rank, alarm_beginTime, create_time, alarm_cid, irms_sn, area_sn, scene_type, maxTemp, minTemp, target_name,
values
#{item.alarmId}, #{item.deviceSn}, #{item.alarmType}, #{item.alarmRank}, #{item.alarmBegintime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.alarmCid}, #{item.irmsSn}, #{item.areaSn}, #{item.sceneType}, #{item.maxTemp}, #{item.minTemp}, #{item.targetName},
mapper.update: update alarm set del_flag='2' where alarm_id = #{alarmId}
mapper.delete:
delete from alarm where alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
mapper.update: update alarm set alarm_endTime = #{endTime},alarm_status = #{alarmStatus} where alarm_cid = #{alarmCId}
mapper.select:
select a.alarm_id, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_status, a.del_flag, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime, a.picture_path, a.video_path, a.create_time, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.scene_type, a.alarm_cid, a.irms_sn, a.target_name from alarm a where a.alarm_id in
#{alarmId}
mapper.update: update alarm set alarm_endTime = #{endTime} where device_sn = #{deviceSn} and alarm_endTime IS NULL and alarm_type !='3'
update alarm set alarm_endTime = #{endTime} where irms_sn = #{irmsSn} and alarm_endTime IS NULL
mapper.select: select a.alarm_id, a.device_sn, a.alarm_type, a.alarm_rank, a.alarm_status, a.del_flag, a.alarm_beginTime, a.alarm_endTime, a.picture_path, a.video_path, a.create_time, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.target_name from alarm a where a.alarm_cid = #{alarmCid} and a.del_flag=0 order by alarm_beginTime,a.create_time desc limit 1
